file.string: There is no transaction made for this order.
No order match the current filter and/or search item.
Order more than 100 days old will be viewed on the Web Dashboard or by search the full order id in the search.
Notes are temporarily disabled by the admin. For assistance, please reach out to the admin.
Enter subject line for the email
Do you want to save the changes?
Internet connection is Required to use this feature.
There is Issue with Your Account Please check the Clover Dashboard
This Permission is required to show the Custom Modal dialog over the Clover Register App. \n
Trigger modal when item is added to cart
Search by name, phone, or email
